Service Discovery & Health Monitoring\n  # ==========================================================================\n  consul:\n    image: consul:1.15.4\n    container_name: xnai_consul\n    init: true\n    user: root\n    ports:\n      - \"8500:8500\"\n      - \"8600:8600/udp\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 256M\n          cpus: '0.2'\n    command: agent -server -ui -bootstrap-expect=1 -client=0.0.0.0\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/consul:/consul/data:Z\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:8500/v1/status/leader\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 10s\n      retries: 3\n      start_period: 10s\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    restart: unless-stopped\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # REDIS SERVICE - Cache & Streams Coordinator\n  # ==========================================================================\n  redis:\n    image: redis:7.4.1\n    container_name: xnai_redis\n    init: true\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 512M\n          cpus: '0.5'\n    command: redis-server --requirepass \"${REDIS_PASSWORD:?REDIS_PASSWORD must be set}\" --maxmemory 512mb --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/redis:/data:Z\n    environment:\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD\n      - REDIS_STREAM_MAX_LEN=${REDIS_STREAM_MAX_LEN:-1000}\n    ports:\n      - \"6379:6379\"\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"sh\", \"-c\", \"redis-cli -a \\\"$REDIS_PASSWORD\\\" ping || exit 1\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 15s\n      retries: 5\n      start_period: 30s\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    restart: unless-stopped\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # QDRANT SERVICE - Vector Database (Phase 3)\n  # ==========================================================================\n  qdrant:\n    image: qdrant/qdrant:v1.13.1\n    container_name: xnai_qdrant\n    init: true\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 1G\n          cpus: '1.0'\n        reservations:\n          memory: 512M\n          cpus: '0.5'\n    ports:\n      - \"6333:6333\"\n      - \"6334:6334\"\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/qdrant:/qdrant/storage:Z\n      - ./config/qdrant_config.yaml:/qdrant/config/config.yaml:ro\n    environment:\n      - QDRANT_API_KEY=${QDRANT_API_KEY:-}\n      - QDRANT_HOST=0.0.0.0\n      - QDRANT_PORT=6333\n      - QDRANT_GRPC_PORT=6334\n      - QDRANT_SNAPSHOT_RECOVERY=true\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"bash\", \"-c\", \"exec 3<>/dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/6333\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 10s\n      retries: 3\n      start_period: 30s\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    restart: unless-stopped\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # RAG SERVICE - FastAPI Backend (Ryzen Tuned)\n  # ==========================================================================\n  rag:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-rag:latest\n    container_name: xnai_rag_api\n    init: true\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 4G\n          cpus: '2.0'\n        reservations:\n          memory: 2G\n          cpus: '1.0'\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    security_opt:\n      - no-new-privileges:true\n    cap_drop:\n      - ALL\n    cap_add:\n      - NET_BIND_SERVICE\n      - CHOWN\n      - SETUID\n      - SETGID\n    read_only: true\n    tmpfs:\n      - /tmp:size=512m,mode=1777\n      - /var/run:size=64m,mode=0755\n      - /app/.cache:size=100m,mode=0755\n      - /app/logs:size=100m,mode=1777\n      - /app/data:size=50m,mode=1777\n    volumes:\n      - ./config.toml:/app/config.toml:ro\n      - ./models:/models:ro\n      - ./embeddings:/embeddings:ro\n      - ./library:/library:z\n      - ./knowledge:/knowledge:z\n      - ./data/faiss_index:/app/data/faiss_index:Z\n      - ./backups:/backups:Z\n      - ./data/prometheus-multiproc:/prometheus_data:Z\n      - ./app/XNAi_rag_app:/app/XNAi_rag_app:ro\n    environment:\n      # --- RYZEN ZEN 2 OPTIMIZATIONS ---\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=6\n      - LLAMA_CPP_N_THREADS=6\n      - LLAMA_CPP_USE_MLOCK=true\n      - LLAMA_CPP_USE_MMAP=true\n      - OMP_NUM_THREADS=1\n      # --- LLM CONFIGURATION ---\n      - LLM_MODEL_PATH=/models/Qwen3-0.6B-Q6_K.gguf\n      # --- NETWORK & API ---\n      - RAG_API_URL=http://rag:8000\n      - REDIS_HOST=redis\n      - REDIS_PORT=6379\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD_FILE=/run/secrets/redis_password\n      - IAM_DB_PATH=/app/data/iam.db\n      - JWT_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH=/app/data/jwt-private-key.pem\n      - JWT_PUBLIC_KEY_PATH=/app/data/jwt-public-key.pem\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs\n      - API_KEY_FILE=/run/secrets/api_key\n      - DEBUG_MODE=false\n      - PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1\n      - PYTHONPATH=/app\n    secrets:\n      - redis_password\n      - api_key\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    # ports:\n    #   - \"8002:8002\" # Removed: metrics routed through Caddy /metrics\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      qdrant:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:8000/health\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 15s\n      retries: 5\n      start_period: 30s\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command:\n      - sh\n      - -c\n      - |\n        echo '🚀 Starting XNAi Foundation RAG API...'\n        [ -f /run/secrets/redis_password ] || (echo '❌ Missing Redis Secret' && exit 1)\n        uvicorn XNAi_rag_app.api.entrypoint:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --log-level info\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # UI SERVICE - Chainlit Frontend (Voice Enabled)\n  # ==========================================================================\n  ui:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.chainlit\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-ui:latest\n    container_name: xnai_chainlit_ui\n    init: true\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 2G\n          cpus: '1.0'\n    tmpfs:\n      - /app/logs:size=100m,mode=1777\n    volumes:\n      - ./config.toml:/app/config.toml:ro\n      - ./models:/models:ro\n      - ./app/XNAi_rag_app:/app/XNAi_rag_app\n      - ./assets:/app/assets\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=6\n      - CHAINLIT_PORT=8001\n      - CHAINLIT_NO_TELEMETRY=true\n      - RAG_API_URL=http://rag:8000\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs\n      - PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1\n      - PYTHONPATH=/app\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      rag:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:8001/\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 15s\n      retries: 5\n      start_period: 90s\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    ports:\n      - \"8001:8001\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command:\n      - sh\n      - -c\n      - |\n        echo '🚀 Starting XNAi Foundation UI...'\n        chainlit run XNAi_rag_app/ui/chainlit_app_voice.py --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # CRAWLER SERVICE - Ingestion Engine\n  # ==========================================================================\n  crawler:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.crawl\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-crawler:latest\n    container_name: xnai_crawler\n    init: true\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 2G\n          cpus: '1.0'\n    volumes:\n      - ./config.toml:/app/config.toml:ro\n      - ./library:/library:z\n      - ./knowledge:/knowledge:z\n      - ./data/cache:/app/cache:Z\n      - ./app/XNAi_rag_app:/app/XNAi_rag_app\n      - /tmp/crawl4ai:/app/.crawl4ai\n      - /tmp/crawler_logs:/app/logs\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - N_THREADS=6\n      - CRAWL4AI_NO_TELEMETRY=true\n      - REDIS_HOST=redis\n      - REDIS_PORT=6379\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - LIBRARY_PATH=/library\n      - KNOWLEDGE_PATH=/knowledge\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      rag:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command: [\"sh\", \"-c\", \"echo '🚀 Crawler service standby...' && while true; do sleep 3600; done\"]\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # CURATION WORKER - Knowledge Refinement\n  # ==========================================================================\n  curation_worker:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.curation_worker\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-curation-worker:latest\n    container_name: xnai_curation_worker\n    init: true\n    restart: on-failure\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 1G\n          cpus: '0.5'\n    depends_on:\n      - redis\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=6\n      - REDIS_HOST=redis\n      - REDIS_PORT=6379\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - DATA_DIR=/app/data/curations\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs/curations\n      - PYTHONPATH=/app\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/curations:/app/data/curations:Z\n      - ./logs/curations:/app/logs/curations:Z\n      - ./app/XNAi_rag_app:/app/XNAi_rag_app:ro\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # MKDOCS SERVICE - Foundation Documentation\n  # ==========================================================================\n  mkdocs:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.docs\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-mkdocs:latest\n    container_name: xnai_mkdocs\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 512M\n          cpus: '0.2'\n    volumes:\n      - ./mkdocs.yml:/workspace/mkdocs.yml:ro\n      - ./docs:/workspace/docs:ro\n      - ./docs-new:/workspace/docs-new:ro\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - N_THREADS=2\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    ports:\n      - \"8008:8000\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command:\n      - sh\n      - -c\n      - |\n        echo '🚀 Starting XNAi Foundation Docs...'\n        cd /workspace && mkdocs serve --config-file mkdocs.yml --dev-addr=0.0.0.0:8000\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # VIKUNJA - Project Management & Knowledge Base Hub\n  # ==========================================================================\n  vikunja-db:\n    image: postgres:16-alpine\n    container_name: xnai_vikunja_db\n    user: \"1001:1001\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_USER: vikunja\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${VIKUNJA_DB_PASSWORD:-vikunja123}\n      POSTGRES_DB: vikunja\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/vikunja/db:/var/lib/postgresql/data:Z\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD-SHELL\", \"pg_isready -U vikunja\"]\n      start_period: 30s\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n\n  vikunja:\n    image: vikunja/vikunja:0.24.1\n    container_name: xnai_vikunja\n    user: \"1001:1001\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    depends_on:\n      vikunja-db:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    environment:\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_TYPE: postgres\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_HOST: vikunja-db\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_USER: vikunja\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_PASSWORD: ${VIKUNJA_DB_PASSWORD:-vikunja123}\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_DATABASE: vikunja\n      VIKUNJA_SERVICE_PUBLICURL: http://localhost:8000/vikunja\n      VIKUNJA_JWT_SECRET: ${VIKUNJA_JWT_SECRET:-changeme_jwt}\n      VIKUNJA_CORS_ENABLE: \"false\"\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_ENABLED: \"true\"\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_HOST: redis:6379\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_PORT: \"6379\"\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_PASSWORD: ${REDIS_PASSWORD:-changeme123}\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_DB: \"5\"\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/vikunja/files:/app/vikunja/files:Z\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # CADDY SERVICE - Unified Reverse Proxy\n  # ==========================================================================\n  caddy:\n    image: caddy:2.8-alpine\n    container_name: xnai_caddy\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 256M\n          cpus: '0.2'\n    ports:\n      - \"8000:8000\"\n    volumes:\n      - ./Caddyfile:/etc/caddy/Caddyfile:ro,Z\n      - ./logs/caddy:/var/log/caddy:Z\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"wget\", \"--quiet\", \"--tries=1\", \"--spider\", \"http://127.0.0.1:2019/config/\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 10s\n      retries: 3\n      start_period: 10s\n\n# ============================================================================ \n# NETWORKS & VOLUMES\n# ============================================================================ \nnetworks:\n  xnai_network:\n    driver: bridge\n    name: xnai_network\n\nsecrets:\n  redis_password:\n    file: ./secrets/redis_password.txt\n  api_key:\n    file: ./secrets/api_key.txt\n"

RAG_API_URL=http://rag:8000\n      - REDIS_HOST=redis\n      - REDIS_PORT=6379\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD_FILE=/run/secrets/redis_password\n      - IAM_DB_PATH=/app/data/iam.db\n      - JWT_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH=/app/data/jwt-private-key.pem\n      - JWT_PUBLIC_KEY_PATH=/app/data/jwt-public-key.pem\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs\n      - API_KEY_FILE=/run/secrets/api_key\n      - DEBUG_MODE=false\n      - PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1\n      - PYTHONPATH=/app\n    secrets:\n      - redis_password\n      - api_key\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    # ports:\n    #   - \"8002:8002\" # Removed: metrics routed through Caddy /metrics\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      qdrant:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:8000/health\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 15s\n      retries: 5\n      start_period: 30s\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command:\n      - sh\n      - -c\n      - |\n        echo '🚀 Starting XNAi Foundation RAG API...'\n        [ -f /run/secrets/redis_password ] || (echo '❌ Missing Redis Secret' && exit 1)\n        uvicorn XNAi_rag_app.api.entrypoint:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --log-level info\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # UI SERVICE - Chainlit Frontend (Voice Enabled)\n  # ==========================================================================\n  ui:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.chainlit\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-ui:latest\n    container_name: xnai_chainlit_ui\n    init: false\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 2G\n          cpus: '1.0'\n    tmpfs:\n      - /app/logs:size=100m,mode=1777\n    volumes:\n      - ./config.toml:/app/config.toml:ro\n      - ./models:/models:ro\n      - ./app/XNAi_rag_app:/app/XNAi_rag_app\n      - ./assets:/app/assets\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=6\n      - CHAINLIT_PORT=8001\n      - CHAINLIT_NO_TELEMETRY=true\n      - RAG_API_URL=http://rag:8000\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs\n      - PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1\n      - PYTHONPATH=/app\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      rag:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:8001/\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 15s\n      retries: 5\n      start_period: 90s\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    ports:\n      - \"8001:8001\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command:\n      - sh\n      - -c\n      - |\n        echo '🚀 Starting XNAi Foundation UI...'\n        chainlit run XNAi_rag_app/ui/chainlit_app_voice.py --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # CRAWLER SERVICE - Ingestion Engine\n  # ==========================================================================\n  crawler:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.crawl\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-crawler:latest\n    container_name: xnai_crawler\n    init: false\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 2G\n          cpus: '1.0'\n    volumes:\n      - ./config.toml:/app/config.toml:ro\n      - ./library:/library:z\n      - ./knowledge:/knowledge:z\n      - ./data/cache:/app/cache:Z\n      - ./app/XNAi_rag_app:/app/XNAi_rag_app\n      - /tmp/crawl4ai:/app/.crawl4ai\n      - /tmp/crawler_logs:/app/logs\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - N_THREADS=6\n      - CRAWL4AI_NO_TELEMETRY=true\n      - REDIS_HOST=redis\n      - REDIS_PORT=6379\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - LIBRARY_PATH=/library\n      - KNOWLEDGE_PATH=/knowledge\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      rag:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command: [\"sh\", \"-c\", \"echo '🚀 Crawler service standby...' && while true; do sleep 3600; done\"]\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # CURATION WORKER - Knowledge Refinement\n  # ==========================================================================\n  curation_worker:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.curation_worker\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-curation-worker:latest\n    container_name: xnai_curation_worker\n    init: false\n    restart: on-failure\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 1G\n          cpus: '0.5'\n    depends_on:\n      - redis\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=6\n      - REDIS_HOST=redis\n      - REDIS_PORT=6379\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - DATA_DIR=/app/data/curations\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs/curations\n      - PYTHONPATH=/app\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/curations:/app/data/curations:Z\n      - ./logs/curations:/app/logs/curations:Z\n      - ./app/XNAi_rag_app:/app/XNAi_rag_app:ro\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # MKDOCS SERVICE - Foundation Documentation\n  # ==========================================================================\n  mkdocs:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.docs\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-mkdocs:latest\n    container_name: xnai_mkdocs\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 512M\n          cpus: '0.2'\n    volumes:\n      - ./mkdocs.yml:/workspace/mkdocs.yml:ro\n      - ./docs:/workspace/docs:ro\n      - ./docs-new:/workspace/docs-new:ro\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - N_THREADS=2\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    ports:\n      - \"8008:8000\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command:\n      - sh\n      - -c\n      - |\n        echo '🚀 Starting XNAi Foundation Docs...'\n        cd /workspace && mkdocs serve --config-file mkdocs.yml --dev-addr=0.0.0.0:8000\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # VIKUNJA - Project Management & Knowledge Base Hub\n  # ==========================================================================\n  vikunja-db:\n    image: postgres:16-alpine\n    container_name: xnai_vikunja_db\n    user: \"1001:1001\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_USER: vikunja\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${VIKUNJA_DB_PASSWORD:-vikunja123}\n      POSTGRES_DB: vikunja\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/vikunja/db:/var/lib/postgresql/data:Z\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD-SHELL\", \"pg_isready -U vikunja\"]\n      start_period: 30s\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n\n  vikunja:\n    image: vikunja/vikunja:0.24.1\n    container_name: xnai_vikunja\n    user: \"1001:1001\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    depends_on:\n      vikunja-db:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    environment:\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_TYPE: postgres\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_HOST: vikunja-db\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_USER: vikunja\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_PASSWORD: ${VIKUNJA_DB_PASSWORD:-vikunja123}\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_DATABASE: vikunja\n      VIKUNJA_SERVICE_PUBLICURL: http://localhost:8000/vikunja\n      VIKUNJA_JWT_SECRET: ${VIKUNJA_JWT_SECRET:-changeme_jwt}\n      VIKUNJA_CORS_ENABLE: \"false\"\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_ENABLED: \"true\"\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_HOST: redis:6379\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_PORT: \"6379\"\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_PASSWORD: ${REDIS_PASSWORD:-changeme123}\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_DB: \"5\"\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/vikunja/files:/app/vikunja/files:Z\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # CADDY SERVICE - Unified Reverse Proxy\n  # ==========================================================================\n  caddy:\n    image: caddy:2.8-alpine\n    container_name: xnai_caddy\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 256M\n          cpus: '0.2'\n    ports:\n      - \"8000:8000\"\n    volumes:\n      - ./Caddyfile:/etc/caddy/Caddyfile:ro,Z\n      - ./logs/caddy:/var/log/caddy:Z\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"wget\", \"--quiet\", \"--tries=1\", \"--spider\", \"http://127.0.0.1:2019/config/\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 10s\n      retries: 3\n      start_period: 10s\n\n# ============================================================================ \n# NETWORKS & VOLUMES\n# ============================================================================ \nnetworks:\n  xnai_network:\n    driver: bridge\n    name: xnai_network\n\nsecrets:\n  redis_password:\n    file: ./secrets/redis_password.txt\n  api_key:\n    file: ./secrets/api_key.txt\n"

./knowledge_base/internal_docs/01-strategic-planning/session-state-archive/events.jsonl:{"type":"assistant.message","data":{"messageId":"75833c41-c643-44f7-a5fd-ffd2f1626300","content":"","toolRequests":[{"toolCallId":"call_6OB7s2nLUjEfe8XRlcjKiGyS","name":"create","arguments":{"path":"/home/arcana-novai/Documents/xnai-foundation/expert-knowledge/model-reference/LOCAL-MODELS-REFERENCE-2026-02-16.md","file_text":"Local Models Reference — Xoe-NovAi Stack\nDate: 2026-02-16\nPath: /home/arcana-novai/Documents/xnai-foundation/models\n\nPurpose\n- Inventory local models, describe runtime options (torch-free where possible), recommend use-cases for the 16‑phase hardening plan, and provide an actionable workflow for using ruvltra-claude-code-0.5b-q4_k_m.gguf to generate structured phase-execution JSON for assigned agents.\n\nSummary of discovered models\n\n1) Gemma-3-1B_int8.onnx\n- Format: ONNX (int8)\n- Type: General LLM / synthesis\n- Best runtimes: onnxruntime (CPU), ONNX-TRT if available on GPU (not recommended for this host)\n- Use-cases: longer-form synthesis when deterministic inference and torch-free runtime are required; good for Phase-level summarization and multi-doc condensation (use in Gemini for heavier synthesis and Copilot for mid‑size summaries).\n- Memory & performance notes: int8 ONNX lowers peak memory; still budget batches and use small chunking (4–8 docs/batch) on Ryzen 5700U.\n- Conversion notes: already ONNX — preferred primary runtime for torch-free policy.\n\n2) Qwen3-0.6B-Q6_K.gguf\n- Format: GGUF (quantized)\n- Type: Small chat/coding LLM\n- Best runtimes: llama.cpp / ggml-based runtimes supporting GGUF\n- Use-cases: low-latency assistant tasks, quick code transforms, validators for structured outputs; useful for Cline lightweight review tasks and Copilot orchestration tasks.\n- Memory & performance: very small footprint; ideal for many concurrent tasks.\n- Conversion notes: no ONNX needed — use GGUF runtime.\n\n3) distil-large-v3 (directory)\n- Format: local model directory (inspect for format/metadata before heavy use)\n- Type: likely distilled transformer (classification / embedding)\n- Use-cases: spot-check classification or QA tasks; validate by reading model card in repository.\n- Action: inspect README or metadata before production use.\n\n4) embeddinggemma-300M-Q8_0.gguf\n- Format: GGUF (embedding model)\n- Type: Embeddings\n- Best runtimes: llama.cpp (embedding mode) or embeddingGemma tooling (see expert-knowledge/embeddings/embeddinggemma-setup-v1.0.0.md)\n- Use-cases: primary embedding model for Qdrant ingestion and FAISS fallback; fits memory constraints well when batching.\n- Notes: use embeddingGemma workflow to avoid torch; run small batches (4–8 docs) for Ryzen 5700U.\n\n5) functiongemma-270m-it-Q6_K.gguf\n- Format: GGUF\n- Type: lightweight function/execution assistant\n- Use-cases: helper tasks (prompt transformations, validation, small conversions), good for Copilot-run checks.\n\n6) gemma-3-1b-it-heretic-abliterated-uncensored.i1-Q5_K_M.gguf\n- Format: GGUF\n- Type: instruction-tuned Gemma 3 (1B)\n- Use-cases: stronger instruction-following when ONNX Gemma isn't required; use carefully with license/policy checks.\n- Notes: prefer onnx Gemma where possible to honor torch-free guardrails; use GGUF for fallback with llama.cpp.\n\n7) piper (directory)\n- Format: TTS engine (Piper resources)\n- Type: Text-to-speech\n- Use-cases: voice interface (Phase 2/Chainlit voice runtime). Use with silero assets.\n- Notes: check piper README for engine & model files.\n\n8) ruvltra-claude-code-0.5b-q4_k_m.gguf\n- Format: GGUF (quantized code-specialized model)\n- Type: Small code / structured-output LLM\n- Best runtimes: llama.cpp / ggml runtimes supporting GGUF\n- Use-cases (high priority): generating deterministic, structured JSON (phase task lists, Vikunja task payloads, execution manifests), parsing and converting short docs into structured entries. Ideal as a fast, local generator for per-batch task extraction prior to Gemini-led deep synthesis and Cline approval.\n- Memory & performance: very low footprint; excellent for running many small structured generations in parallel within memory budget.\n- Validation: always validate model output against a JSON schema (jq, jsonschema, or a second-pass verifier model) before persisting to Redis or creating Vikunja tasks.\n\n9) silero (directory)\n- Format: TTS / speech models\n- Use-cases: audio front-end (voice UX). See silero docs in repo.\n\n\nHow these models map to the 16-phase hardening plan\n- Embeddings (Phase‑0 indexing & Phase B pre-execution): use embeddinggemma-300M.gguf via embeddingGemma or llama.cpp embedding mode to produce vectors for Qdrant/FAISS with small batch sizes.\n- Fast structured task generation (Phase batching): use ruvltra-claude-code-0.5b to convert doc excerpts into structured JSON tasks for Vikunja and for Cline/Gemini review.\n- Mid-size summarization & authoritative decisions: use Gemma-3-1B_int8.onnx (onnxruntime) when torch-free deterministic synthesis is required and context fits; for longer contexts, delegate to Gemini (external) or use on-disk FAISS + streaming strategies to keep tokens small.\n- TTS and voice testing (Phase 2): use piper + silero assets for voice runtime verification and integration tests.\n- Low-latency orchestration and validators: use Qwen3-0.6B and functiongemma-270m for quick checks, schema validation, and pre-commit formatting.\n\nONNX conversion guidance (torch-free policy)\n- Prefer models already available as ONNX (Gemma-3-1B_int8.onnx) and use onnxruntime for inference to comply with torch-free policy.\n- Many GGUF models (Qwen3, ruvltra, embeddingGemma) are directly usable via llama.cpp / ggml runtimes without PyTorch — this is the recommended torch-free path for GGUF assets.\n- Converting GGUF → ONNX typically requires access to the original PyTorch weights and a conversion toolchain (transformers/exporters), which demands PyTorch; avoid converting locally under torch-free constraints unless performed in an isolated, ephemeral environment that complies with project policies.\n\nPractical workflow to generate structured phase execution JSON using ruvltra-claude-code-0.5b (recommended)\n1) Extraction: For each doc chunk (size tuned to 512–2k tokens), prompt ruvltra with a strict JSON-only scaffold and low temperature (0.0–0.2) to produce deterministic results.\n\nPrompt template (system + user):\n- System: \"You are a structured task generator. Output ONLY a JSON object that follows the schema provided. Do not include explanatory text.\"\n- User: \"Schema: {\\\"phase\\\":string, \\\"tasks\\\":[{\\\"id\\\":string,\\\"title\\\":string,\\\"description\\\":string,\\\"assigned_agent\\\":string,\\\"est_minutes\\\":number,\\\"acceptance_criteria\\\":string}], \\\"dependencies\\\":[], \\\"notes\\\":string}\\n\\nSource: <insert doc excerpt>\\n\\nGenerate the JSON manifest for this source.\"\n\n2) Validation: Run produced JSON through jq/jsonschema or a second-pass verifier model (Qwen3-0.6B or functiongemma) to ensure schema compliance.\n3) Persistence: On pass, write to Redis keyspace doc-tasks:{phase}:{id} and create Vikunja tasks via the prepared vikunja_tasks.json templates.\n4) Review: Assign to agent:cline-kat for authoritative human review; if approved, Copilot executes non-destructive moves and updates Qdrant/FAISS indices.\n\nExample CLI invocation (llama.cpp-like runtime)\n- Use deterministic settings (low temp, top_k/top_p tuned)\n- Example (conceptual):\n  ./main -m models/ruvltra-claude-code-0.5b-q4_k_m.gguf -p \"<PROMPT_FROM_TEMPLATE>\" -n 512 --temp 0.2 --top_k 40\n- If using a Python wrapper (llama-cpp-python), set model params accordingly and capture raw output for validation.\n\nRecommendations & next steps\n- Action 1: Use embeddinggemma-setup guidance in expert-knowledge/embeddings/ before running batch embeddings to ensure torch-free embedding pipeline.\n- Action 2: Use ruvltra-claude-code-0.5b for an initial smoke-test: generate Phase-1 structured JSON from MASTER-PLAN-v3.1.md excerpt and validate via functiongemma or Qwen3; confirm schema & persistence flow.\n- Action 3: For large synthesis needs, favor Gemma-3-1B_int8.onnx via onnxruntime to remain torch-free, and reserve GGUF models for low-memory, fast tasks.\n- Action 4: Add per-model model-cards into expert-knowledge/model-reference/ (one-per-file) if deeper provenance/license details are required — can be auto-generated from this summary.\n\nNotes on safety, telemetry, and memory\n- Zero-telemetry: all runtimes above are local only; do not enable remote logging/telemetry.\n- Memory safety: always batch small and free model handles between runs; follow Xoe-NovAi cleanup pattern: del model; gc.collect(); await asyncio.sleep(0.1) when using python wrappers.\n\nIf you want, next step can be: (A) run a smoke test generation with ruvltra for Phase 1 (I'll run a local generation and validate), (B) run embeddingGemma test with embeddinggemma-300M for a small subset, or (C) create per-model model-cards in expert-knowledge/model-reference/ as separate files.\n\n-- END --\n"},"type":"function"}]},"id":"41a412dd-5bc5-4073-8b62-d8d7cf3f265a","timestamp":"2026-02-16T15:00:46.424Z","parentId":"ed3c9916-3843-435e-9043-0b9139d18576"}

validate by reading model card in repository.\n+- Action: inspect README or metadata before production use.\n+\n+4) embeddinggemma-300M-Q8_0.gguf\n+- Format: GGUF (embedding model)\n+- Type: Embeddings\n+- Best runtimes: llama.cpp (embedding mode) or embeddingGemma tooling (see expert-knowledge/embeddings/embeddinggemma-setup-v1.0.0.md)\n+- Use-cases: primary embedding model for Qdrant ingestion and FAISS fallback; fits memory constraints well when batching.\n+- Notes: use embeddingGemma workflow to avoid torch; run small batches (4–8 docs) for Ryzen 5700U.\n+\n+5) functiongemma-270m-it-Q6_K.gguf\n+- Format: GGUF\n+- Type: lightweight function/execution assistant\n+- Use-cases: helper tasks (prompt transformations, validation, small conversions), good for Copilot-run checks.\n+\n+6) gemma-3-1b-it-heretic-abliterated-uncensored.i1-Q5_K_M.gguf\n+- Format: GGUF\n+- Type: instruction-tuned Gemma 3 (1B)\n+- Use-cases: stronger instruction-following when ONNX Gemma isn't required; use carefully with license/policy checks.\n+- Notes: prefer onnx Gemma where possible to honor torch-free guardrails; use GGUF for fallback with llama.cpp.\n+\n+7) piper (directory)\n+- Format: TTS engine (Piper resources)\n+- Type: Text-to-speech\n+- Use-cases: voice interface (Phase 2/Chainlit voice runtime). Use with silero assets.\n+- Notes: check piper README for engine & model files.\n+\n+8) ruvltra-claude-code-0.5b-q4_k_m.gguf\n+- Format: GGUF (quantized code-specialized model)\n+- Type: Small code / structured-output LLM\n+- Best runtimes: llama.cpp / ggml runtimes supporting GGUF\n+- Use-cases (high priority): generating deterministic, structured JSON (phase task lists, Vikunja task payloads, execution manifests), parsing and converting short docs into structured entries. Ideal as a fast, local generator for per-batch task extraction prior to Gemini-led deep synthesis and Cline approval.\n+- Memory & performance: very low footprint; excellent for running many small structured generations in parallel within memory budget.\n+- Validation: always validate model output against a JSON schema (jq, jsonschema, or a second-pass verifier model) before persisting to Redis or creating Vikunja tasks.\n+\n+9) silero (directory)\n+- Format: TTS / speech models\n+- Use-cases: audio front-end (voice UX). See silero docs in repo.\n+\n+\n+How these models map to the 16-phase hardening plan\n+- Embeddings (Phase‑0 indexing & Phase B pre-execution): use embeddinggemma-300M.gguf via embeddingGemma or llama.cpp embedding mode to produce vectors for Qdrant/FAISS with small batch sizes.\n+- Fast structured task generation (Phase batching): use ruvltra-claude-code-0.5b to convert doc excerpts into structured JSON tasks for Vikunja and for Cline/Gemini review.\n+- Mid-size summarization & authoritative decisions: use Gemma-3-1B_int8.onnx (onnxruntime) when torch-free deterministic synthesis is required and context fits; for longer contexts, delegate to Gemini (external) or use on-disk FAISS + streaming strategies to keep tokens small.\n+- TTS and voice testing (Phase 2): use piper + silero assets for voice runtime verification and integration tests.\n+- Low-latency orchestration and validators: use Qwen3-0.6B and functiongemma-270m for quick checks, schema validation, and pre-commit formatting.\n+\n+ONNX conversion guidance (torch-free policy)\n+- Prefer models already available as ONNX (Gemma-3-1B_int8.onnx) and use onnxruntime for inference to comply with torch-free policy.\n+- Many GGUF models (Qwen3, ruvltra, embeddingGemma) are directly usable via llama.cpp / ggml runtimes without PyTorch — this is the recommended torch-free path for GGUF assets.\n+- Converting GGUF → ONNX typically requires access to the original PyTorch weights and a conversion toolchain (transformers/exporters), which demands PyTorch; avoid converting locally under torch-free constraints unless performed in an isolated, ephemeral environment that complies with project policies.\n+\n+Practical workflow to generate structured phase execution JSON using ruvltra-claude-code-0.5b (recommended)\n+1) Extraction: For each doc chunk (size tuned to 512–2k tokens), prompt ruvltra with a strict JSON-only scaffold and low temperature (0.0–0.2) to produce deterministic results.\n+\n+Prompt template (system + user):\n+- System: \"You are a structured task generator. Output ONLY a JSON object that follows the schema provided. Do not include explanatory text.\"\n+- User: \"Schema: {\\\"phase\\\":string, \\\"tasks\\\":[{\\\"id\\\":string,\\\"title\\\":string,\\\"description\\\":string,\\\"assigned_agent\\\":string,\\\"est_minutes\\\":number,\\\"acceptance_criteria\\\":string}], \\\"dependencies\\\":[], \\\"notes\\\":string}\\n\\nSource: <insert doc excerpt>\\n\\nGenerate the JSON manifest for this source.\"\n+\n+2) Validation: Run produced JSON through jq/jsonschema or a second-pass verifier model (Qwen3-0.6B or functiongemma) to ensure schema compliance.\n+3) Persistence: On pass, write to Redis keyspace doc-tasks:{phase}:{id} and create Vikunja tasks via the prepared vikunja_tasks.json templates.\n+4) Review: Assign to agent:cline-kat for authoritative human review; if approved, Copilot executes non-destructive moves and updates Qdrant/FAISS indices.\n+\n+Example CLI invocation (llama.cpp-like runtime)\n+- Use deterministic settings (low temp, top_k/top_p tuned)\n+- Example (conceptual):\n+  ./main -m models/ruvltra-claude-code-0.5b-q4_k_m.gguf -p \"<PROMPT_FROM_TEMPLATE>\" -n 512 --temp 0.2 --top_k 40\n+- If using a Python wrapper (llama-cpp-python), set model params accordingly and capture raw output for validation.\n+\n+Recommendations & next steps\n+- Action 1: Use embeddinggemma-setup guidance in expert-knowledge/embeddings/ before running batch embeddings to ensure torch-free embedding pipeline.\n+- Action 2: Use ruvltra-claude-code-0.5b for an initial smoke-test: generate Phase-1 structured JSON from MASTER-PLAN-v3.1.md excerpt and validate via functiongemma or Qwen3; confirm schema & persistence flow.\n+- Action 3: For large synthesis needs, favor Gemma-3-1B_int8.onnx via onnxruntime to remain torch-free, and reserve GGUF models for low-memory, fast tasks.\n+- Action 4: Add per-model model-cards into expert-knowledge/model-reference/ (one-per-file) if deeper provenance/license details are required — can be auto-generated from this summary.\n+\n+Notes on safety, telemetry, and memory\n+- Zero-telemetry: all runtimes above are local only; do not enable remote logging/telemetry.\n+- Memory safety: always batch small and free model handles between runs; follow Xoe-NovAi cleanup pattern: del model; gc.collect(); await asyncio.sleep(0.1) when using python wrappers.\n+\n+If you want, next step can be: (A) run a smoke test generation with ruvltra for Phase 1 (I'll run a local generation and validate), (B) run embeddingGemma test with embeddinggemma-300M for a small subset, or (C) create per-model model-cards in expert-knowledge/model-reference/ as separate files.\n+\n+-- END --\n+\n"},"toolTelemetry":{"properties":{"command":"create","options":"{\"truncateBasedOn\":\"tokenCount\",\"truncateStyle\":\"middle\"}","inputs":"[\"path\",\"file_text\",\"command\"]","resolvedPathAgainstCwd":"false","fileExtension":".md","filePaths":"[\"/home/arcana-novai/Documents/xnai-foundation/expert-knowledge/model-reference/LOCAL-MODELS-REFERENCE-2026-02-16.md\"]"},"metrics":{"resultLength":148,"resultForLlmLength":148,"responseTokenLimit":32000,"linesAdded":111,"linesRemoved":0},"restrictedProperties":{}}},"id":"2c665a2a-12f7-49aa-a432-85267f25484b","timestamp":"2026-02-16T15:00:46.433Z","parentId":"915363ae-5b09-4219-905b-92ef8f89c109"}

Phase 1 v0.1.7 (BuildKit Optimized)\n# ============================================================================ \n# Purpose: Multi-service orchestration for the XNAi Foundation Stack.\n# Optimized for: AMD Ryzen 5700U (Zen 2) | 8 Cores / 16 Threads\n# Hardening: Zero-Trust, Rootless Podman, Maat Ethical Guardrails.\n# ============================================================================ \n\nservices:\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # CONSUL SERVICE - Service Discovery & Health Monitoring\n  # ==========================================================================\n  consul:\n    image: consul:1.15.4\n    container_name: xnai_consul\n    init: true\n    user: root\n    ports:\n      - \"8500:8500\"\n      - \"8600:8600/udp\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 256M\n          cpus: '0.2'\n    command: agent -server -ui -bootstrap-expect=1 -client=0.0.0.0\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/consul:/consul/data:Z\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:8500/v1/status/leader\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 10s\n      retries: 3\n      start_period: 10s\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    restart: unless-stopped\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # REDIS SERVICE - Cache & Streams Coordinator\n  # ==========================================================================\n  redis:\n    image: redis:7.4.1\n    container_name: xnai_redis\n    init: true\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 512M\n          cpus: '0.5'\n    command: redis-server --requirepass \"${REDIS_PASSWORD:?REDIS_PASSWORD must be set}\" --maxmemory 512mb --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/redis:/data:Z\n    environment:\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD\n      - REDIS_STREAM_MAX_LEN=${REDIS_STREAM_MAX_LEN:-1000}\n    ports:\n      - \"6379:6379\"\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"sh\", \"-c\", \"redis-cli -a \\\"$REDIS_PASSWORD\\\" ping || exit 1\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 15s\n      retries: 5\n      start_period: 30s\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    restart: unless-stopped\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # QDRANT SERVICE - Vector Database (Phase 3)\n  # ==========================================================================\n  qdrant:\n    image: qdrant/qdrant:v1.13.1\n    container_name: xnai_qdrant\n    init: true\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 1G\n          cpus: '1.0'\n        reservations:\n          memory: 512M\n          cpus: '0.5'\n    ports:\n      - \"6333:6333\"\n      - \"6334:6334\"\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/qdrant:/qdrant/storage:Z\n      - ./config/qdrant_config.yaml:/qdrant/config/config.yaml:ro\n    environment:\n      - QDRANT_API_KEY=${QDRANT_API_KEY:-}\n      - QDRANT_HOST=0.0.0.0\n      - QDRANT_PORT=6333\n      - QDRANT_GRPC_PORT=6334\n      - QDRANT_SNAPSHOT_RECOVERY=true\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"bash\", \"-c\", \"exec 3<>/dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/6333\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 10s\n      retries: 3\n      start_period: 30s\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    restart: unless-stopped\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # RAG SERVICE - FastAPI Backend (Ryzen Tuned)\n  # ==========================================================================\n  rag:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-rag:latest\n    container_name: xnai_rag_api\n    init: true\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 4G\n          cpus: '2.0'\n        reservations:\n          memory: 2G\n          cpus: '1.0'\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    security_opt:\n      - no-new-privileges:true\n    cap_drop:\n      - ALL\n    cap_add:\n      - NET_BIND_SERVICE\n      - CHOWN\n      - SETUID\n      - SETGID\n    read_only: true\n    tmpfs:\n      - /tmp:size=512m,mode=1777\n      - /var/run:size=64m,mode=0755\n      - /app/.cache:size=100m,mode=0755\n      - /app/logs:size=100m,mode=1777\n      - /app/data:size=50m,mode=1777\n    volumes:\n      - ./config.toml:/app/config.toml:ro\n      - ./models:/models:ro\n      - ./embeddings:/embeddings:ro\n      - ./library:/library:z\n      - ./knowledge:/knowledge:z\n      - ./data/faiss_index:/app/data/faiss_index:Z\n      - ./backups:/backups:Z\n      - ./data/prometheus-multiproc:/prometheus_data:Z\n      - ./app/XNAi_rag_app:/app/XNAi_rag_app:ro\n    environment:\n      # --- RYZEN ZEN 2 OPTIMIZATIONS ---\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=6\n      - LLAMA_CPP_N_THREADS=6\n      - LLAMA_CPP_USE_MLOCK=true\n      - LLAMA_CPP_USE_MMAP=true\n      - OMP_NUM_THREADS=1\n      # --- LLM CONFIGURATION ---\n      - LLM_MODEL_PATH=/models/Qwen3-0.6B-Q6_K.gguf\n      # --- NETWORK & API ---\n      - RAG_API_URL=http://rag:8000\n      - REDIS_HOST=redis\n      - REDIS_PORT=6379\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD_FILE=/run/secrets/redis_password\n      - IAM_DB_PATH=/app/data/iam.db\n      - JWT_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH=/app/data/jwt-private-key.pem\n      - JWT_PUBLIC_KEY_PATH=/app/data/jwt-public-key.pem\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs\n      - API_KEY_FILE=/run/secrets/api_key\n      - DEBUG_MODE=false\n      - PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1\n      - PYTHONPATH=/app\n    secrets:\n      - redis_password\n      - api_key\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    # ports:\n    #   - \"8002:8002\" # Removed: metrics routed through Caddy /metrics\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      qdrant:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:8000/health\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 15s\n      retries: 5\n      start_period: 30s\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command:\n      - sh\n      - -c\n      - |\n        echo '🚀 Starting XNAi Foundation RAG API...'\n        [ -f /run/secrets/redis_password ] || (echo '❌ Missing Redis Secret' && exit 1)\n        uvicorn XNAi_rag_app.api.entrypoint:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --log-level info\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # UI SERVICE - Chainlit Frontend (Voice Enabled)\n  # ==========================================================================\n  ui:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.chainlit\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-ui:latest\n    container_name: xnai_chainlit_ui\n    init: true\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 2G\n          cpus: '1.0'\n    tmpfs:\n      - /app/logs:size=100m,mode=1777\n    volumes:\n      - ./config.toml:/app/config.toml:ro\n      - ./models:/models:ro\n      - ./app/XNAi_rag_app:/app/XNAi_rag_app\n      - ./assets:/app/assets\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=6\n      - CHAINLIT_PORT=8001\n      - CHAINLIT_NO_TELEMETRY=true\n      - RAG_API_URL=http://rag:8000\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs\n      - PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1\n      - PYTHONPATH=/app\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      rag:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:8001/\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 15s\n      retries: 5\n      start_period: 90s\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    ports:\n      - \"8001:8001\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command:\n      - sh\n      - -c\n      - |\n        echo '🚀 Starting XNAi Foundation UI...'\n        chainlit run XNAi_rag_app/ui/chainlit_app_voice.py --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # CRAWLER SERVICE - Ingestion Engine\n  # ==========================================================================\n  crawler:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.crawl\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-crawler:latest\n    container_name: xnai_crawler\n    init: true\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 2G\n          cpus: '1.0'\n    volumes:\n      - ./config.toml:/app/config.toml:ro\n      - ./library:/library:z\n      - ./knowledge:/knowledge:z\n      - ./data/cache:/app/cache:Z\n      - ./app/XNAi_rag_app:/app/XNAi_rag_app\n      - /tmp/crawl4ai:/app/.crawl4ai\n      - /tmp/crawler_logs:/app/logs\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - N_THREADS=6\n      - CRAWL4AI_NO_TELEMETRY=true\n      - REDIS_HOST=redis\n      - REDIS_PORT=6379\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - LIBRARY_PATH=/library\n      - KNOWLEDGE_PATH=/knowledge\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      rag:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command: [\"sh\", \"-c\", \"echo '🚀 Crawler service standby...' && while true; do sleep 3600; done\"]\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # CURATION WORKER - Knowledge Refinement\n  # ==========================================================================\n  curation_worker:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.curation_worker\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-curation-worker:latest\n    container_name: xnai_curation_worker\n    init: true\n    restart: on-failure\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 1G\n          cpus: '0.5'\n    depends_on:\n      - redis\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=6\n      - REDIS_HOST=redis\n      - REDIS_PORT=6379\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - DATA_DIR=/app/data/curations\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs/curations\n      - PYTHONPATH=/app\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/curations:/app/data/curations:Z\n      - ./logs/curations:/app/logs/curations:Z\n      - ./app/XNAi_rag_app:/app/XNAi_rag_app:ro\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # MKDOCS SERVICE - Foundation Documentation\n  # ==========================================================================\n  mkdocs:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.docs\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-mkdocs:latest\n    container_name: xnai_mkdocs\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 512M\n          cpus: '0.2'\n    volumes:\n      - ./mkdocs.yml:/workspace/mkdocs.yml:ro\n      - ./docs:/workspace/docs:ro\n      - ./docs-new:/workspace/docs-new:ro\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - N_THREADS=2\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    ports:\n      - \"8008:8000\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command:\n      - sh\n      - -c\n      - |\n        echo '🚀 Starting XNAi Foundation Docs...'\n        cd /workspace && mkdocs serve --config-file mkdocs.yml --dev-addr=0.0.0.0:8000\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # VIKUNJA - Project Management & Knowledge Base Hub\n  # ==========================================================================\n  vikunja-db:\n    image: postgres:16-alpine\n    container_name: xnai_vikunja_db\n    user: \"1001:1001\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_USER: vikunja\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${VIKUNJA_DB_PASSWORD:-vikunja123}\n      POSTGRES_DB: vikunja\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/vikunja/db:/var/lib/postgresql/data:Z\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD-SHELL\", \"pg_isready -U vikunja\"]\n      start_period: 30s\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n\n  vikunja:\n    image: vikunja/vikunja:0.24.1\n    container_name: xnai_vikunja\n    user: \"1001:1001\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    depends_on:\n      vikunja-db:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    environment:\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_TYPE: postgres\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_HOST: vikunja-db\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_USER: vikunja\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_PASSWORD: ${VIKUNJA_DB_PASSWORD:-vikunja123}\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_DATABASE: vikunja\n      VIKUNJA_SERVICE_PUBLICURL: http://localhost:8000/vikunja\n      VIKUNJA_JWT_SECRET: ${VIKUNJA_JWT_SECRET:-changeme_jwt}\n      VIKUNJA_CORS_ENABLE: \"false\"\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_ENABLED: \"true\"\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_HOST: redis:6379\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_PORT: \"6379\"\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_PASSWORD: ${REDIS_PASSWORD:-changeme123}\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_DB: \"5\"\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/vikunja/files:/app/vikunja/files:Z\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # CADDY SERVICE - Unified Reverse Proxy\n  # ==========================================================================\n  caddy:\n    image: caddy:2.8-alpine\n    container_name: xnai_caddy\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 256M\n          cpus: '0.2'\n    ports:\n      - \"8000:8000\"\n    volumes:\n      - ./Caddyfile:/etc/caddy/Caddyfile:ro,Z\n      - ./logs/caddy:/var/log/caddy:Z\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"wget\", \"--quiet\", \"--tries=1\", \"--spider\", \"http://127.0.0.1:2019/config/\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 10s\n      retries: 3\n      start_period: 10s\n\n# ============================================================================ \n# NETWORKS & VOLUMES\n# ============================================================================ \nnetworks:\n  xnai_network:\n    driver: bridge\n    name: xnai_network\n\nsecrets:\n  redis_password:\n    file: ./secrets/redis_password.txt\n  api_key:\n    file: ./secrets/api_key.txt\n"

/var/run:size=64m,mode=0755\n      - /app/.cache:size=100m,mode=0755\n      - /app/logs:size=100m,mode=1777\n      - /app/data:size=50m,mode=1777\n    volumes:\n      - ./config.toml:/app/config.toml:ro\n      - ./models:/models:ro\n      - ./embeddings:/embeddings:ro\n      - ./library:/library:z\n      - ./knowledge:/knowledge:z\n      - ./data/faiss_index:/app/data/faiss_index:Z\n      - ./backups:/backups:Z\n      - ./data/prometheus-multiproc:/prometheus_data:Z\n      - ./app/XNAi_rag_app:/app/XNAi_rag_app:ro\n    environment:\n      # --- RYZEN ZEN 2 OPTIMIZATIONS ---\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=6\n      - LLAMA_CPP_N_THREADS=6\n      - LLAMA_CPP_USE_MLOCK=true\n      - LLAMA_CPP_USE_MMAP=true\n      - OMP_NUM_THREADS=1\n      # --- LLM CONFIGURATION ---\n      - LLM_MODEL_PATH=/models/Qwen3-0.6B-Q6_K.gguf\n      # --- NETWORK & API ---\n      - RAG_API_URL=http://rag:8000\n      - REDIS_HOST=redis\n      - REDIS_PORT=6379\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD_FILE=/run/secrets/redis_password\n      - IAM_DB_PATH=/app/data/iam.db\n      - JWT_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH=/app/data/jwt-private-key.pem\n      - JWT_PUBLIC_KEY_PATH=/app/data/jwt-public-key.pem\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs\n      - API_KEY_FILE=/run/secrets/api_key\n      - DEBUG_MODE=false\n      - PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1\n      - PYTHONPATH=/app\n    secrets:\n      - redis_password\n      - api_key\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    # ports:\n    #   - \"8002:8002\" # Removed: metrics routed through Caddy /metrics\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      qdrant:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:8000/health\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 15s\n      retries: 5\n      start_period: 30s\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command:\n      - sh\n      - -c\n      - |\n        echo '🚀 Starting XNAi Foundation RAG API...'\n        [ -f /run/secrets/redis_password ] || (echo '❌ Missing Redis Secret' && exit 1)\n        uvicorn XNAi_rag_app.api.entrypoint:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --log-level info\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # UI SERVICE - Chainlit Frontend (Voice Enabled)\n  # ==========================================================================\n  ui:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.chainlit\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-ui:latest\n    container_name: xnai_chainlit_ui\n    init: false\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 2G\n          cpus: '1.0'\n    tmpfs:\n      - /app/logs:size=100m,mode=1777\n    volumes:\n      - ./config.toml:/app/config.toml:ro\n      - ./models:/models:ro\n      - ./app/XNAi_rag_app:/app/XNAi_rag_app\n      - ./assets:/app/assets\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=6\n      - CHAINLIT_PORT=8001\n      - CHAINLIT_NO_TELEMETRY=true\n      - RAG_API_URL=http://rag:8000\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs\n      - PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1\n      - PYTHONPATH=/app\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      rag:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"curl\", \"-f\", \"http://localhost:8001/\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 15s\n      retries: 5\n      start_period: 90s\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    ports:\n      - \"8001:8001\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command:\n      - sh\n      - -c\n      - |\n        echo '🚀 Starting XNAi Foundation UI...'\n        chainlit run XNAi_rag_app/ui/chainlit_app_voice.py --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # CRAWLER SERVICE - Ingestion Engine\n  # ==========================================================================\n  crawler:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.crawl\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-crawler:latest\n    container_name: xnai_crawler\n    init: false\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 2G\n          cpus: '1.0'\n    volumes:\n      - ./config.toml:/app/config.toml:ro\n      - ./library:/library:z\n      - ./knowledge:/knowledge:z\n      - ./data/cache:/app/cache:Z\n      - ./app/XNAi_rag_app:/app/XNAi_rag_app\n      - /tmp/crawl4ai:/app/.crawl4ai\n      - /tmp/crawler_logs:/app/logs\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - N_THREADS=6\n      - CRAWL4AI_NO_TELEMETRY=true\n      - REDIS_HOST=redis\n      - REDIS_PORT=6379\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - LIBRARY_PATH=/library\n      - KNOWLEDGE_PATH=/knowledge\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs\n    depends_on:\n      redis:\n        condition: service_healthy\n      rag:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command: [\"sh\", \"-c\", \"echo '🚀 Crawler service standby...' && while true; do sleep 3600; done\"]\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # CURATION WORKER - Knowledge Refinement\n  # ==========================================================================\n  curation_worker:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.curation_worker\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-curation-worker:latest\n    container_name: xnai_curation_worker\n    init: false\n    restart: on-failure\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 1G\n          cpus: '0.5'\n    depends_on:\n      - redis\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=6\n      - REDIS_HOST=redis\n      - REDIS_PORT=6379\n      - REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}\n      - DATA_DIR=/app/data/curations\n      - LOG_DIR=/app/logs/curations\n      - PYTHONPATH=/app\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/curations:/app/data/curations:Z\n      - ./logs/curations:/app/logs/curations:Z\n      - ./app/XNAi_rag_app:/app/XNAi_rag_app:ro\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # MKDOCS SERVICE - Foundation Documentation\n  # ==========================================================================\n  mkdocs:\n    build:\n      context: .\n      dockerfile: Dockerfile.docs\n      args:\n        BUILDKIT_INLINE_CACHE: 1\n    image: xnai-mkdocs:latest\n    container_name: xnai_mkdocs\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 512M\n          cpus: '0.2'\n    volumes:\n      - ./mkdocs.yml:/workspace/mkdocs.yml:ro\n      - ./docs:/workspace/docs:ro\n      - ./docs-new:/workspace/docs-new:ro\n    environment:\n      - OPENBLAS_CORETYPE=ZEN\n      - N_THREADS=2\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    ports:\n      - \"8008:8000\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    command:\n      - sh\n      - -c\n      - |\n        echo '🚀 Starting XNAi Foundation Docs...'\n        cd /workspace && mkdocs serve --config-file mkdocs.yml --dev-addr=0.0.0.0:8000\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # VIKUNJA - Project Management & Knowledge Base Hub\n  # ==========================================================================\n  vikunja-db:\n    image: postgres:16-alpine\n    container_name: xnai_vikunja_db\n    user: \"1001:1001\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    environment:\n      POSTGRES_USER: vikunja\n      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${VIKUNJA_DB_PASSWORD:-vikunja123}\n      POSTGRES_DB: vikunja\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/vikunja/db:/var/lib/postgresql/data:Z\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD-SHELL\", \"pg_isready -U vikunja\"]\n      start_period: 30s\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n\n  vikunja:\n    image: vikunja/vikunja:0.24.1\n    container_name: xnai_vikunja\n    user: \"1001:1001\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    depends_on:\n      vikunja-db:\n        condition: service_healthy\n    environment:\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_TYPE: postgres\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_HOST: vikunja-db\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_USER: vikunja\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_PASSWORD: ${VIKUNJA_DB_PASSWORD:-vikunja123}\n      VIKUNJA_DATABASE_DATABASE: vikunja\n      VIKUNJA_SERVICE_PUBLICURL: http://localhost:8000/vikunja\n      VIKUNJA_JWT_SECRET: ${VIKUNJA_JWT_SECRET:-changeme_jwt}\n      VIKUNJA_CORS_ENABLE: \"false\"\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_ENABLED: \"true\"\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_HOST: redis:6379\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_PORT: \"6379\"\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_PASSWORD: ${REDIS_PASSWORD:-changeme123}\n      VIKUNJA_REDIS_DB: \"5\"\n    volumes:\n      - ./data/vikunja/files:/app/vikunja/files:Z\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n\n  # ==========================================================================\n  # CADDY SERVICE - Unified Reverse Proxy\n  # ==========================================================================\n  caddy:\n    image: caddy:2.8-alpine\n    container_name: xnai_caddy\n    user: \"${APP_UID:-1001}:${APP_GID:-1001}\"\n    restart: unless-stopped\n    deploy:\n      resources:\n        limits:\n          memory: 256M\n          cpus: '0.2'\n    ports:\n      - \"8000:8000\"\n    volumes:\n      - ./Caddyfile:/etc/caddy/Caddyfile:ro,Z\n      - ./logs/caddy:/var/log/caddy:Z\n    networks:\n      - xnai_network\n    healthcheck:\n      test: [\"CMD\", \"wget\", \"--quiet\", \"--tries=1\", \"--spider\", \"http://127.0.0.1:2019/config/\"]\n      interval: 30s\n      timeout: 10s\n      retries: 3\n      start_period: 10s\n\n# ============================================================================ \n# NETWORKS & VOLUMES\n# ============================================================================ \nnetworks:\n  xnai_network:\n    driver: bridge\n    name: xnai_network\n\nsecrets:\n  redis_password:\n    file: ./secrets/redis_password.txt\n  api_key:\n    file: ./secrets/api_key.txt\n"
